# UC-11.7.2 · Asterisk CDR Mean Opinion Score Distribution and Tail Risk

## Description

MOS summarizes perceived voice quality. A widening left tail flags WAN jitter, one-way audio precursors, or transcoding before executives complain.

## Value

Supports trunk SLAs, guides codec policy, and documents improvements after QoS work.

## Implementation

(1) Populate MOS from RTP QoS or SBC export. (2) Alias to `rtp_mos`. (3) Histogram dashboard with SLA line. (4) Alert on p90 MOS drop week over week.

## SPL

```spl
index=voip sourcetype="asterisk:cdr" earliest=-7d
| eval mos=tonumber(coalesce(rtp_mos, MOS, mos_score, userfield_mos, ""))
| where isnotnull(mos) AND mos>0
| bin mos span=0.25
| stats count by mos
| eventstats sum(count) as total
| eval pct=round(100*count/total,2)
```

## Visualization

Histogram; timechart p50/p90; drilldown by `uniqueid`.
